framework.name: Microsoft Entra Agent ID
framework.description: Microsoft is building enterprise SaaS directory with policy and zero-trust integration specifically for agent identity — positioned as 'Entra Agent ID' (not just Workload ID). This confirms proprietary path with enterprise governance focus rather than open standards contribution.
framework.raw_quote: Microsoft Entra Agent ID (enterprise SaaS directory with policy and zero-trust integration)
